title: Doflamingo's Kingdom Erupts
description: Pages 11–15 focus on doflamingo's kingdom erupts, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Doflamingo as the restored humans throw the country into chaos as Kyros returns and Doflamingo's carefully controlled kingdom begins to collapse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaah- Hi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where are you going?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: About there, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Where did they vanish to?!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Hm?! "Young Master"?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: My name is Don- Quixo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kin'Emon in disguise - Donquixote DoFlaemon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: -oh,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah, well... I will leave the intruders to you! I have to go and check on Kanjurou down below!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: That Samurai who disap- peared in the scrap- yard?!?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Young Master?!! Why are you here?!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: "Young master" is what they call do- Flamingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I am young master!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: There are intruders inside the Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You should wait upstairs until we elimi- Nate them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He disap- peared?!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: ...w...we seem to have arrived directly outside the room we seek....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey, why are we hiding?! Mingo was right there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Quiet! We mustn't ruin their opera- lion!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Opera- Tion?!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Your target is the smile factory alone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Isn't that right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: This isn't something you could pull off on impulse in a single day......!!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Why are the straw hats connected to the dwarfs of Green Bit?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: How did they infilitate the under- ground...?!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Why are they tar- getting sugar?!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: If this isn't coincidence...it means they know the very root of the darkness in this country....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Didn't you hear the young master ask you a question?! Let's hear some answers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Law!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Someone knows

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: You don't have to do it if it makes you cry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: You two really are the same as ever.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I told you already...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: that crew has nothing to do with me any more...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Our alliance is over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I can barely understand a damn thing you're saying...

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: Hmph....!! If only violet were here, we could have the truth out of you in no time, but alas...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I hope you don't have anything to do with all this... King Riku!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: The Tontatta served you, once upon a time...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: father!! Why is he in the Palace...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Looks like Law's alive, at least!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: King Riku?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: You have stayed safe... All these years....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Your name is kyros...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Come with me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I will save you... without FAIL!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: Are Leo and the others still not done?! When all the toys in dressrose turn back into humans, including myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: That moment will be our greatest chance to eliminate Dofla- Mingo...! I swear I will not fail...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Can we go yet?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: No!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I cannot let Kabu and Rampo's sacrifice go to waste.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: I'm counting on you, Leo...uso- land...!!!

summary: Doflamingo's Kingdom Erupts focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the restored humans throw the country into chaos as Kyros returns and Doflamingo's carefully controlled kingdom begins to collapse.
